Title: Loan Products Configuration
Description: Admins can define loan products (term interest model app fees default grace period).

Title: Loan Application & Application Fee
Description: Member applies via UI. M-Pesa STK push for app fee. Callback auto-confirms and advances state.

Title: Guarantor Capture Module
Description: Capture guarantors for the loan application.

Title: Loans Officer Verification (Tier 1)
Description: Requires LOANS_APPROVE permission. Officer reviews and advances state.

Title: Committee Final Approval (Tier 2)
Description: Requires LOANS_COMMITTEE_APPROVE permission. Committee approves final limit/terms.

Title: Treasurer Disbursement & GL Posting
Description: Requires LOANS_DISBURSE permission. Post GL Journal (Cr Bank Dr Loan Receivable). State -> ACTIVE.

Title: Unbreakable Weekly Schedule Engine
Description: Generate Week 1..N schedule. Time passes chronologically regardless of payment behavior.

Title: Arrears & Prepayment Calculation Tracking
Description: Underpaid -> Arrears. Overpaid -> Prepayment Credit. Credit auto-covers future weeks.

Title: M-Pesa STK Loan Repayment (Automated)
Description: Trigger STK via UI. Callback automatically records payment. NO manual posting allowed.

Title: Waterfall Repayment Allocation Engine
Description: Allocate strictly: 1) Interest (oldest) 2) Principal (oldest) 3) Prepayment Credit. Do NOT pay penalties.

Title: Member & Staff Loan Dashboard UI
Description: Unified UI showing active loans weekly countdowns arrears balances and prepayment credits.

Title: Penalty Rules Configuration
Description: Admins define penalty rules (e.g. LOAN_MISSED_INSTALLMENT) fixed amounts and interest rates.

Title: Schedule Engine Trigger: Missed Installment Penalty
Description: Loan schedule shortfall generates Penalty Instance + GL Journal (Dr Penalty Receivable Cr Penalty Income).

Title: Periodic Penalty Interest Accrual Job
Description: Background job calculates interest on outstanding penalties + posts GL journals.

Title: Member Penalties UI & Dynamic Dropdown
Description: Requires PENALTIES_READ_SELF. Dropdown shows OPEN penalties only + 'Select ALL' option.

Title: Penalty Payment Processing & Allocation
Description: Requires PENALTIES_PAY_SELF. STK Push + callback. Allocates oldest first (interest then principal). Posts GL.

Title: Treasurer Penalty Adjustments & Waivers
Description: Requires PENALTIES_WAIVE_ADJUST. Waive/adjust penalty + strictly generate Reversing GL Journal.
